title: All About Technology
description: Small size modpack with all the essential tech mods! No magic or fancy stuff! Just industry!
body:
![Modpack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5006e303ae0d071a3c98ccd310f329df6d1883b.png)
# Welcome to All About Technology!

In this "small-size" modpack you will find all the mods I personally consider indispensable when thinking about technology. There are no objectives or tasks to complete, just build whatever you like. 
Most of these mods are interchangeable, so you can choose which one to use.

I'll update this modpack every once in a while when I find new interesting mods or these get updated. Knowing that not everybody (me included) owns a very powerful computer, I've added some mods to improve performance.

Just remember: "THE FACTORY MUST GROW!!!".
